signals.raw:
South Korea's Annual Inflation Rises to 2.2% in March 2026 | NO | HIGH confidence**  
This is the most recent inflation data available, reported as up from 2.0% in January and February 2026 but below market forecasts of 2.4%, with no new confirmations, announcements, or resolutions today that would shift prediction markets[1].
